texto: As science is more and more subject to grave misuse as well as to use for human benefit it has also become the scientist's responsibility to become aware of the social relations and applications of his subject, and to exert his influence in such a direction as will result in the best applications of the findings in his own and related fields. Thus he must help in educating the public, in the broad sense, and this means first educating himself, not only in science but in regard to the great issues confronting mankind today.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Hermann Joseph Muller sobre temas ligados a tempo. A afirmação “As science is more and more subject to grave misuse as well as to use for human benefit it has al…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a tempo, applications, benefit, útil em momentos de viagem e benefit.
